examples: He was told that the doors had been installed incorrectly.
The magazine suggested, incorrectly, that he was planning to announce his retirement.
In the same drawing, she incorrectly lumped together army and leaf-cutter ants.
"This would be likely and incorrectly perceived to be a black and Hispanic problem, " he said.
The water will cool the air significantly, but he explained it incorrectly, or you misunderstood him.
